enchantment.contrasting_curses.exclusivi: Prevents the addition of any exclusive enchantments.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.expenditu: Adds a 33%% chance to consume an additional arrow.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.misfire_c: Arrows have a 20%% chance to misfire on the ground.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.elders_wr: Inflicts occasional mining fatigue when mining.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.channelin: Occasionally strikes the holder with lightning in rain.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.insomnia_: Nightmares have a chance to spawn when sleeping.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.snapping_: Fish have a 15%% chance to snap off the line.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.ignition_: Ignites block and mob item drops.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.gigantism: Increases the size of the wearer.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.dwarfism_: Decreases the size and reach of the wearer.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.purity_cu: Prevents the addition of any other curses.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.abyssborn: Buffs the wearer when underground, otherwise debuffs. Effects include protection, armor, damage, speed, haste.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.astralbor: Buffs the wearer when near the clouds, otherwise debuffs. Effects include protection, armor, damage, speed, haste.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.trampling: Tramples crops, plants, and suspicious blocks when worn.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.vulnerabi: Attacks received deal extra damage while using the item.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.headwind_: Headwinds have a chance to kill momentum while flying.
enchantment.contrasting_curses.burden_cu: Modifies the wearer's movement speed by inventory fill.
